    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.Main
    Starts the application.
    Main - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog
    Entry point of the WorkoutLog application.
    Main() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.Main
    Private constructor to prevent instantiation.
    MainWindow - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    The main application window of WorkoutLog — the controller of the MVC design.
    MainWindow(WorkoutLog) - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow
    Creates and displays the main application window.
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Moderate-effort workout, the most common training level.
    mediumButton - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Radio button for "medium" intensity.
